g.text: - ack != 0 and evaluated != 0 and result == 0 -> WARN
1. Scenario tab writes Test::scenarioCommand or Test::scenarioStopReq
2. TEST_SCN accepts, mirrors, and locks the active scenario
3. TEST_SCN publishes commandAck / activeId / evaluatedId / result
4. TEST_SCN also drives STOP / WARN / RUN lamp seams
5. Input_Console reads back the same seams as the scenario state panel
